case_title: HOA NGUYEN VS. KATIE BALLOU CALHOUN

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-02-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-22-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-11-2016 CONTINUED TO JUN-22-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100021151), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HOA SERVED MAY-12-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALHOUN, KATIE BALLOU
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100000676) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, HOA
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST BRIAN L LARSEN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-20-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-06-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-20-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-02-2016 CONTINUED TO SEP-20-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-02-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
